annotation_target.structure: Exposition closing antecedent — G major cadential gestures
teaching_goals: feel the sense of formal completion as the exposition closes
style_tips: slight broadening toward the exposition close is appropriate

teaching_notes.note: Closing cadential figures — purposeful and clear.
technique: clean articulation on the cadential figures

target_trace.objective: Read mm. 25–28 of Piano Sonata No. 16 in C Major, K. 545, I. Allegro, view the piano roll, analyze the phrase, play in a loop, and predict the continuation.

session.content: Show me measures 25–28 of Mozart K545 — are we closing the exposition here?
Let me view the piano roll for mm. 25–28.

Measures 25–28 are the exposition's closing section — Mozart wraps up the G major second theme area with cadential gestures and a sense of completion. The Alberti bass continues. Let me loop mm. 25–28.
Mozart K545 mm. 25–28: exposition closing section, G major cadential gestures, completion approaching.
